---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for JARL
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief one-liner describing the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. Include any UI mockups, API designs, or workflow descriptions if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, external docs, or screenshots.
